case_title: SEDDIK CHAUL VS. CAPISCE'S CUCINA LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAUL, SEDDIK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPISCE'S CUCINA LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $8,019.73 PRINCIPAL, $28.71 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,273.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUL, SEDDIK AS TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER
